title: ENERGY ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: SALVATION ARMY KROC SOCIAL SERVICES MARION COUNTY ENERGY ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides financial assistance for electric and water utility payments. Assistance amounts depend on available funding. 1977 Front Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Requires a final shut-off notice. Additional eligibility requirements may apply depending on the funding source. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm (503) 585-6688 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 585-6688 Family Services Main phone (503) 585-6688 Family Services INTAKE PROCEDURE: By appointment only. Call for more information. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: City of West Salem and Marion County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: 1/2 mile north of Market Street on the west side of Front Street. Cherriots bus routes 9,19 Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance Water Service Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: DONOR SERVICES - SCHOOL SUPPLIES DONATIONS FOOD - FOOD PANTRY HOUSING/SHELTER - RENT PAYMENT ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SALVATION ARMY KROC SOCIAL SERVICES MARION COUNTY
